summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of GEO Boost Engine landing page. All 18 specified features tested successfully including hero section, social proof, problem/solution sections, pricing, FAQ accordion, mobile responsiveness, and dark theme styling.
passed_tests: Hero section loads with correct headline 'Get Your Business Recommended by ChatGPT & Google AI in 48 Hours'
Hero CTA button displays '$199' and is clickable
Trust indicators show '24-48 hours', 'No calls required', 'Actionable fixes included'
Social proof section shows '127+ businesses analyzed' stat
Problem section explains AI visibility issue with feature cards
Solution section shows 4 benefits with checkmarks
How It Works section displays 3 steps
Pricing section shows value stack with $199 price
Urgency banner shows '10 reports per day' message
Final CTA section with 'Stop Losing Customers' headline
All CTA buttons scroll to pricing section
Page has proper dark theme styling with yellow CTAs
